## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss progress and updates across multiple client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Augment Code signed for $50,000/month; production ramping up with review process to be streamlined](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Diligent project facing challenges with siloed teams; comprehensive site audit underway](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Scrunch tool demonstrating quick wins in content visibility tracking for clients](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Multiple accounts (Monograph, Metronome, Surge) showing positive progress and expansion](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)

## Topics

### Augment Code Progress

  - [Signed for $50,000/month after learning valuable lessons from first strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [6 articles ready after addressing comments, 10 more for review, 10 in production](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Indexing limited to 1 per day due to quota restrictions; workaround needed](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Aiming for 20 articles per week cadence; review process to be optimized](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

### Diligent Project Challenges

  - [Site audit underway: 180 blogs identified for refreshing, manual checks required](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Multiple siloed teams (content, SEO, resources) causing communication issues](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Weekly sync established, but getting all stakeholders involved is challenging](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Audit compilation progressing well, with pruning recommendations forthcoming](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)

### Scrunch Tool Demonstration

  - [Quick wins in content visibility tracking for Augment Code within hours of publishing](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Tool showing article citations and topic presence, resonating well with clients](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating targeted prompts based on topic clusters for better tracking](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### Client Updates

  - [Monograph: AI images feedback addressed, calibration blog to be staged, 38 topics approved](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

  - [Surge: Large contract proposal ($300,000/month) awaiting price confirmation](https://fathom.video/share/MZetmwZsdXAzv47eZ9j5SWdsmB-5_uVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
